title: Portable allays
description: A mod improving the portability of allays
body:
# Portable Allays!
"Portable Allays", that lets you turn Allays into portable companions with a twist. With this mod, you can transform Allays into mystical scrolls that can be stored or released at will. But the magic doesn’t end there—equip your Allays with utility blocks, from furnaces to crafting tables and even shulker boxes! Now, your Allay can carry and allow you access to items and blocks wherever you go.

This alpha version is still in development, so feedback and ideas are welcome as we refine the mod’s features and capabilities. Discover a new way to adventure with "Portable Allays" and make the most of your Allay's loyalty and utility!

# Credits
* Some Fool - Art and Original Idea
